candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line; reported revenue and preferred candidate.
Revenue-related but non-GAAP, so less preferred than reported revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the reported revenue line rather than non-GAAP revenue.

candidates.why: Direct COGS line and best match for cost of sales.
Also a valid COGS total, but duplicates the direct COGS line.
Appears to be a component/derived row and not preferable when direct COGS exists.

variables.notes: Used the clearest direct production cost row; avoided duplicate alternative COGS labels.

candidates.why: Clear selling overhead component above operating profit.
Clear administrative overhead component above operating profit.
Dedicated R&D operating expense above operating profit; included so XSGA-XRD removes it per rule.
Likely subcomponent/derived support row under selling expenses; not needed when parent expense row exists.
Likely subcomponent/derived support row under administration expenses; not needed when parent expense row exists.
Likely subcomponent of R&D and not needed when full R&D expense row exists.

variables.notes: CR:nc|high. No single explicit combined SG&A row is present, so selected operating overhead components. Included R&D because it is separately reported above operating profit and should also be in XSGA_COMPONENTS so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD excludes it.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; best match.
Appears to be a subcomponent, not preferable to the full R&D expense line.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line exists above operating profit and is also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS to allow subtraction in PROF.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component; appropriate to include.
Recurring interest cost component; appropriate to include.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and similar profit loss items
candidates.why: Broader total that appears to include FX and other financial losses, so less preferred than granular recurring interest rows.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest component; avoid double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Used granular recurring interest components and excluded the broader total because it appears to include foreign exchange losses and other items. Excluded supplemental duplicate rows to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders
candidates.why: Best equity line because it excludes non-controlling interests by definition.
Usable only if no parent/owners equity line existed; less preferred because it could include NCI.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the parent companys shareholders

variables.notes: Preferred parent shareholders' equity to avoid any potential double counting with minority interest.
No minority interest/non-controlling interest line appears on the provided balance sheet.
